en: Human Resources wants to talk to me tomorrow.
Could you stop licking your ass for two minutes?
ko: 두 분만 엉덩이를 핥는 걸 멈출 수 있어?

en: Do you really think you should be drinking right now?
How else am I supposed to talk to the Human Resources lady?
I don't know. Seek professional help.
I did. The guy at the liquor store said this stuff tastes great in coffee.
ko: 받았어. 술집 아저씨가 이거 커피에 넣으면 맛있다고 하더라.

en: Sheldon threw us all under the bus.
I feel like I've been called down to the principal's office.
Although I wouldn't mind if brown sugar suspended me.
This may have been a mistake.
Relax. Everything is going to be fine.
ko: 진정해. 모든 게 잘 될 거야.

en: Before I met Bernadette, I was in here every other day.
ko: 버나뎃을 만나기 전에는 매일 여기 왔어.
